name: Cry Babies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Gradually add the molasses to the creamed mixture, stirring constantly.
3. In a separate bowl, sift together the flour, cinnamon, ginger, and baking soda.
4. Alternately add the sifted ingredients and coffee into the molasses mixture, mixing well after each addition.
5. Stir in the raisins and chopped walnuts or pecans until evenly distributed.
6. Drop spoonfuls of batter 1 to 1 1/2 inches apart onto ungreased cookie sheets.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 12 to 15 minutes, or until lightly browned.
